subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! I beseech Thee, by Thy Most Great and Most Glorious Name, to send down from the clouds of Thy mercy the rains [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمک الاعظم الابهی ان تنزل من سحاب رحمتک امطار
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
